tooltip.title: Width
tooltip.description: The measurement of the item from side to side.

tooltip.title: Depth
tooltip.description: The measurement of the item from the very front to the very back.

tooltip.title: Height
tooltip.description: The overall measurement of the item from the floor to its highest point (how tall the item is).

tooltip.title: Fuel Type
tooltip.description: The energy source the item uses to function, like generating heat or flames, such as Electric or Gas.

tooltip.title: More Ways to Shop
tooltip.description: Filter by special categories such as in stock, specials, or items currently on sale.

tooltip.title: Appliance Fit Width
tooltip.description: The width of the product rounded to a whole number. The actual width might be slightly smaller or larger.

products.name: Jennair® NOIR™ 30" Stainless Steel Single Electric Wall Oven with MultiMode® True Convection
products.short_description: The oven's MultiMode® Convection system weaves steady heat around the racks. With curated recipes and full-color doneness images on the Culinary Center and the Air Fry function, this Smart Wall Oven transforms prepped food and ingredients into delicious dinners.
